lesson.menu_desc: Asking clear questions to get the answers you need -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 4 -- Asking Effective Questions on Calls
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Patrícia Xavier Lima Iwashita | Aula 4 -- Asking Effective Questions on Calls

listenings.text: Hi Patrícia, this is David. Before our call tomorrow, I want to share the agenda. First, we will review the rollout status. Then, we will address the open security concern. Finally, we will confirm the priorities for next week. If anything is not clear, please raise it early. I always like to leave time for questions at the end, so feel free to ask me to clarify or recap any point. Talk soon.

Hi Patrícia, this is Priya. I listened to the recording, but I have a few questions before we sync. Could you tell me what the new deadline is? I also want to double-check who is responsible for the test environment. One more thing: I was wondering if the client has confirmed the training date. Please rephrase the last action item if you can, because I want to be sure I understood it. I will follow up with the details by email. Thank you.
